title: [Apache Flink 1.9.3 Released](</2020/04/24/apache-flink-1.9.3-released/>)
summary:
#  Apache Flink 1.9.3 Released
April 24, 2020 - Dian Fu (@DianFu11)
The Apache Flink community released the third bugfix version of the Apache Flink 1.9 series.
This release includes 38 fixes and minor improvements for Flink 1.9.2. The list…
